notes: 1.2.9 (2026-07-10T01:30:24Z) patch release ~3 days after 1.2.8 (07-06). updateState metadata/counters delta-channel fix (#8315). Third DeltaChannel-related fix in ~10 days: 06-30 1.2.7 DeltaChannel snapshot-overwrite-supersteps + 07-06 1.2.8 updateState-on-fresh-thread + 07-09/10 1.2.9 updateState-metadata/counters-delta-channel. Release-notes body brief; no breaking change; specific technical detail beyond PR title not in release notes summary. Severity 🟡 (borderline ⚠/🟡 → down per doctrine because release-notes-body-technical-detail is minimal and the fix is a third-fix-in-arc without a clear widening pattern). Three-fix DeltaChannel arc (06-30 + 07-06 + 07-09) is a Monthly Integration slot candidate for KB-06 §hosted-agent-observability if cadence continues into 07-15+ or pattern surfaces in a Cat-4 practitioner blog.
